skills.name: Invincibility
skills.description: Class starter — brief, on-demand immunity to all incoming damage

grantedAbility.name: Invincibility
grantedAbility.description: Become immune to all damage for 3 seconds

skills.name: Rending Strikes
skills.description: Attacks have a chance to cause bleeding

grantedAbility.name: Guardian's Aura
grantedAbility.description: Raise your defenses, gaining +20 defense for 3 turns

skills.name: Demoralizing Shout
skills.description: A fearsome shout that weakens enemy attacks

grantedAbility.name: Demoralizing Shout
grantedAbility.description: Shout with fury, reducing all enemy attack by 20% for 3 turns

grantedAbility.name: Life Drain
grantedAbility.description: A draining strike that heals you for 20% of damage dealt

skills.name: Concussive Blow
skills.description: A stunning strike that dazes the target

grantedAbility.name: Concussive Blow
grantedAbility.description: A heavy blow that stuns the enemy for 1 turn

grantedAbility.name: Sunder Armor
grantedAbility.description: Smash through armor, lowering enemy defense by 25% for 3 turns

grantedAbility.name: Execute
grantedAbility.description: Deal 3x damage to targets below 30% health

skills.name: Ignite Weapon
skills.description: Enflame your weapon, burning enemies on hit

skills.name: Bloodlust
skills.description: Each bleed on target increases your damage

grantedAbility.name: Avatar Form
grantedAbility.description: Transform into an avatar of war, boosting all stats for 4 turns

skills.name: Relentless
skills.description: Killing blows restore stamina and reset cooldowns

skills.name: Mana Shield
skills.description: Class starter — incoming damage is paid from mana before health

skills.name: Wand Magic
skills.description: Class starter — equip up to 2 spell recipes (slot 1 and slot 2) and cast them with your wand
skills.effect: Unlocks spell slots 1 & 2 from spell recipes

skills.name: Renew
skills.description: Class starter — gentle heal-over-time on a friendly target

grantedAbility.name: Renew
grantedAbility.description: Heal target for 4% HP per second for 5 seconds

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Class starter — low-damage fire projectile that applies a burn DoT

grantedAbility.name: Fireball
grantedAbility.description: Hurl a low-damage fireball that applies burn for 3% damage per second over 3 seconds

skills.name: Flame Brand
skills.description: Ignite the target in searing flames

grantedAbility.name: Flame Brand
grantedAbility.description: Set the target ablaze, burning for 15% spell damage over 4 turns

grantedAbility.name: Blessing
grantedAbility.description: Bless yourself with divine light, healing 8% HP per turn for 4 turns

grantedAbility.name: Meteor Strike
grantedAbility.description: Call down a devastating meteor hitting all enemies

grantedAbility.name: Chain Lightning
grantedAbility.description: Launch lightning that chains to all enemies

skills.name: Slumber
skills.description: Put the target into a magical sleep

grantedAbility.name: Slumber
grantedAbility.description: Lull the enemy into a deep sleep for 2 turns. Damage wakes them.

skills.name: Mind Break
skills.description: Shatter mental defenses, lowering magic resistance

grantedAbility.name: Mind Break
grantedAbility.description: Shatter the enemy mind, lowering defense by 20% for 3 turns

grantedAbility.name: Holy Nova
grantedAbility.description: Release a burst of holy energy, healing yourself for 25% HP

skills.name: Bewilderment
skills.description: Confuse the target, making them attack randomly

grantedAbility.name: Bewilderment
grantedAbility.description: Bewitch the enemy mind, confusing them for 2 turns. They may attack allies.

grantedAbility.name: Purify
grantedAbility.description: Cleanse all debuffs from yourself and heal 15% HP

grantedAbility.name: Arcane Cataclysm
grantedAbility.description: Unleash a devastating arcane storm hitting all enemies

skills.name: Spellweave
skills.description: Spells have a chance to apply a random debuff (burn, sleep, confuse, lower defense)

skills.name: Bear Form
skills.description: Class starter — shapeshift into a bear: high HP, melee claws, slow but tanky

grantedAbility.name: Bear Form
grantedAbility.description: Take the form of a bear — gain bonus HP and defense, melee claw attacks

skills.name: Feral Instinct
skills.description: Chance for a bonus follow-up attack on hit

skills.name: Lacerate
skills.description: Claw attack that causes deep bleeding

grantedAbility.name: Lacerate
grantedAbility.description: Rip into the target with claws, causing bleed for 10% damage over 4 turns

skills.name: Soothing Rain
skills.description: Call rain that heals over time

grantedAbility.name: Soothing Rain
grantedAbility.description: Call a gentle rain that heals 6% HP per turn for 5 turns

skills.name: Raptor Form
skills.description: Shapeshift into a raptor: fast, agile, hit-and-run claw strikes

grantedAbility.name: Raptor Form
grantedAbility.description: Take the form of a raptor — gain attack speed and crit, fast claw strikes

grantedAbility.name: Thunderclap
grantedAbility.description: Slam the ground stunning all enemies for 1 turn

grantedAbility.name: Venom Strike
grantedAbility.description: A venomous dagger strike that poisons for 4 turns

skills.name: Entangle
skills.description: Vines root and damage the target

grantedAbility.name: Entangle

grantedAbility.name: Tempest
grantedAbility.description: Summon a raging tempest hitting all enemies

skills.name: Primal Roar

grantedAbility.name: Primal Roar

skills.name: Savage Rend
skills.description: Bear form attacks cause deep wounds

skills.name: Flight Form
skills.description: Shapeshift into a flying form: aerial mobility and ranged dive attacks

grantedAbility.name: Flight Form
grantedAbility.description: Take to the air — gain flight, evasion, and a dive-strike attack

skills.name: Nature's Wrath
skills.description: Command storm and wild as one

grantedAbility.name: Nature's Wrath
grantedAbility.description: Unleash primal storm hitting all enemies

skills.name: Alpha Predator
skills.description: Each kill in bear form extends duration and heals

skills.name: Focus Strike
skills.description: Class starter — every 3rd attack becomes a Focus Strike. Choose between Micro Crit (1.25x damage) or Poison Sting (4s slow + poison DoT). Toggleable.
skills.effect: Every 3rd attack: Micro Crit OR Poison Sting (player choice)

variants.name: Poison Sting
variants.description: Every 3rd attack applies poison + slow for 4 seconds

grantedAbility.name: Venom Arrow
grantedAbility.description: Fire a poison-tipped arrow that deals poison damage over 4 turns

skills.name: Hunter's Mark
skills.description: Mark the target, lowering its defense

grantedAbility.name: Hunter's Mark
grantedAbility.description: Mark the enemy, reducing their defense by 20% for 4 turns

grantedAbility.name: Piercing Shot
grantedAbility.description: Fire an armor-piercing arrow that ignores defense

grantedAbility.name: Multishot
grantedAbility.description: Fire a spread of arrows hitting all enemies

grantedAbility.description: Set a trap that stuns the enemy for 1 turn

grantedAbility.description: Fire a barbed arrow that causes bleeding for 12% damage over 4 turns

grantedAbility.name: Sniper Shot

grantedAbility.name: Wind Walk
grantedAbility.description: Vanish into the wind, boosting evasion by 60% for 2 turns

grantedAbility.name: Arrow Storm
